userStories.title: Load TRLIRNR complete from BOE-A-2004-4527
acceptanceCriteria: Load BOE-A-2004-4527 as codigo=TRLIRNR through the existing BOE consolidated pipeline
Load all deterministic BOE blocks into norma, articulo and version_articulo
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose --env-file /etc/esdata/esdata.env -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; COUNT=$($COMPOSE exec -T postgres psql -U esdata -d esdata -tAc "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM articulo WHERE norma_id=(SELECT id FROM norma WHERE codigo='TRLIRNR')"); echo "TRLIRNR articles: $COUNT"; [ "$COUNT" -ge 53 ] && curl -sf -H "X-API-Key: $ESDATA_API_KEY" http://localhost:${API_PORT:-8000}/v1/legislacion/TRLIRNR/articulos/14 | jq '.texto' | grep -v 'null' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Add IRNR alias so TRLIRNR is reachable by both identifiers
acceptanceCriteria: Resolve IRNR as an alias for TRLIRNR in legislation routes
Verify /v1/legislacion/IRNR/articulos/14 returns the same text as TRLIRNR
userStories.verificationCommand: curl -sf http://localhost:${API_PORT:-8000}/v1/legislacion/IRNR/articulos/14 | jq '.texto' | grep -v 'null' && curl -sf http://localhost:${API_PORT:-8000}/v1/legislacion/TRLIRNR/articulos/14 | jq '.texto' | grep -v 'null' && echo PASS || echo FAIL-ALIAS-NOT-WORKING

userStories.title: Fix LIVA article name typo: 163 sexvivies -> 163 sexvicies
acceptanceCriteria: Correct the LIVA article numero typo with a targeted update
userStories.verificationCommand: COMPOSE='docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml'; RESULT=$($COMPOSE exec postgres psql -U $PGUSER -d $PGDATABASE -tAc "SELECT numero FROM articulo WHERE numero ILIKE '%sexvi%'"); echo "Result: $RESULT"; echo "$RESULT" | grep -q 'sexvicies' && echo "$RESULT" | grep -qv 'sexvivies' && echo PASS || echo FAIL-TYPO-STILL-PRESENT

userStories.title: Write BOE completeness test by BOE ID
acceptanceCriteria: Fail on zero articles for core BOE laws
Warn but do not fail on conservative count drift except TRLIRNR
userStories.verificationCommand: pytest apps/api/tests/test_boe_completeness.py -v 2>&1 | tail -15 | grep -E 'passed|PASSED' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Add TRLIRNR to mcp_validation_suite and mcp_deep_contract_audit
acceptanceCriteria: Validation suite checks TRLIRNR and IRNR alias
Deep audit checks TRLIRNR verified response and LIVA 163 sexvicies
userStories.verificationCommand: docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml run --rm worker python mcp_validation_suite.py 2>&1 | grep 'ok=true' && docker compose -f infra/deploy/docker-compose.prod.yml run --rm worker python mcp_deep_contract_audit.py 2>&1 | grep 'ok=true' && echo PASS || echo FAIL

userStories.title: Final verification
acceptanceCriteria: Full suite and MCP audits remain green
userStories.verificationCommand: pytest apps/ -q --basetemp .pytest-tmp 2>&1 | tail -3 | grep -E 'passed' && curl -sf http://localhost:${API_PORT:-8000}/v1/legislacion/TRLIRNR/articulos/14 | jq '.texto' | grep -v 'null' && echo PASS || echo FAIL
